nasb.text: But we have cast them down, Heshbon is ruined as far as Dibon, Then we have laid waste even to Nophah, Which reaches to Medeba.”

esv.text: So we overthrew them; Heshbon, as far as Dibon, perished; and we laid waste as far as Nophah; fire spread as far as Medeba.”

cnv.text: 我們射擊他們， 希實本就毀滅，直到底本。 我們使地荒涼，直到挪法， 挪法直伸到米底巴。”

ccb.text: 但我们击溃了亚摩利人， 从希实本一直到底本都被摧毁， 从挪法到米底巴都沦为废墟。”
